name: Hendvar's Enchanting Tools
description: Portable enchanting station — a toolkit rather than a fixed station.

name: Whetstone of Keen Edge
effect: 1/rest.
notes: Single minor benefit — no attunement required.

name: Everlasting Blue Candles
description: Candles that do not burn down.

name: Boots of the Tireless North
description: Soft leather, northern make, clan stitching along the ankle. Worn looking but perfectly preserved. Sized for small feet.
effect: No movement penalties in difficult terrain (snow, ice, mud, rubble). Travel pace never causes exhaustion regardless of distance covered in a day.
notes: Single utility benefit — no attunement required.

name: Blackwood Wand Focus
description: Blackwood wand usable as a spellcasting focus.
effect: +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC.
notes: +1 bonus only — no attunement required.

name: Veilstrike Rapier +2
notes: +2 bonus — attunement required.

name: Echo Dagger +2
notes: Off-hand secondary weapon — no attunement required.

name: Warden Dagger
notes: Boot dagger. +1 only — no attunement required.

name: Hand Crossbow +2 (Rooting)
effect: Once per turn on a hit: choose to deal damage as normal OR root target in place until end of their next turn.
notes: Secondary sidearm — no attunement required.

name: Hand Crossbow (standard)
notes: Backup ranged.

name: Wyvern Scale Coat +2
notes: +2 armor bonus — attunement required.

name: Bracer of Swift Strikes
notes: Reaction: free off-hand attack on main hand hit. Powerful active reaction — attunement required.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection
notes: Single noncombat utility benefit — no attunement required.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
notes: Single noncombat utility — no attunement required.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.
notes: Multiple significant combat benefits — attunement required.

name: Ring of Mind Shielding
notes: Niche noncombat utility — no attunement required.

name: Hat of Disguise
notes: Noncombat utility — no attunement required.

name: Vest of Resistance (Cold)
notes: Single elemental resistance — no attunement required. Superseded by Mithral Half Plate — should be stored.

name: Green Cloak of Presence
effect: Advantage on Persuasion and Performance checks. Once per day: hold a room.
notes: Social only — no attunement required.

name: Ioun Stone of Mastery
effect: Proficiency bonus increases by 1 while attuned.
notes: Proficiency bonus affects everything — significant enough to require attunement.

name: Cloak of Unremarkability
effect: Wearer becomes visually uncompelling — the eye slides past without focusing.
notes: Single noncombat utility — no attunement required.

name: Wand of Secrets
effect: Detects secret doors and traps within 30ft.
notes: Utility only — no attunement required.

name: Coin of Truth
effect: Ask yes/no questions. Always truthful.
notes: Roleplay only — no attunement required.

name: Eight Unknown Coins
notes: Large gold coins, unfamiliar crest. Not Western Reach minting.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC — attunement required.

name: Ring of Protection +1
notes: RAW requires attunement. Multiple benefits (AC + saves).

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Disadvantage on all attacks until damage taken — very powerful — attunement required.

name: Ring of Free Action
effect: Unaffected by difficult terrain, movement speed reduction, and paralysis.
notes: Paralysis immunity is significant — attunement required.

name: Belt of Giant Strength
effect: Sets STR to 27.
notes: Stat override affecting primary combat stat — attunement required.

name: Vest of Resistance (Cold)
notes: Single elemental resistance — no attunement required.

name: Greatsword +3
effect: On a critical hit: target makes a STR saving throw or is knocked prone.
notes: +3 primary weapon — attunement required.

name: Ceremonial Horn
effect: Functions as both drinking vessel and musical instrument.
notes: Pre-clan-separation northern craftsmanship. No attunement required.

name: Paired Shortsword
notes: Resonance advantage on first attack — powerful property — attunement required.

name: Dagger of Swift Strike +1
effect: Once per turn on a hit: immediately make a second strike with this dagger as part of the same attack, without using a bonus action.
notes: Free extra attack — very powerful — attunement required.

name: Leather Armor +2
notes: +2 armor — attunement required.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
notes: Single passive stealth benefit — no attunement required.

name: Gloves of Thievery
notes: +5 Sleight of Hand and lockpicking. Noncombat utility — no attunement required.

name: Ring of Watchful Eye
notes: +1 perception, darkvision, detect magic 1/day. All minor benefits — no attunement required.

name: Ring of Stilled Breath
notes: Niche utility — no attunement required.

name: Cloak of Arachnida
effect: Spider climb. Immunity to web. Cast Web 1/day.
notes: Multiple benefits including spell casting — attunement required.

name: Cold Dagger +2
effect: Deals cold damage. On hit: target's movement reduced by 10ft until start of their next turn.
notes: Secondary weapon with single rider effect — no attunement required.

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
effect: Reaction when hit by ranged attack: reduce damage by 1d10 + DEX. If reduced to 0, catch the missile.
notes: Powerful active reaction — attunement required.

name: Alchemical Dagger
notes: Passive utility properties — no attunement required.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release than standard heavy crossbow.
notes: Primary ranged weapon but custom bolt effects are Jaygar's own alchemy not the weapon. No attunement required. Proficiency resolution still needed.

name: Alchemical Heavy Crossbow (party copy)
effect: Fires custom alchemical bolts. Quieter release.
notes: Second copy. Available for party use.

name: Magical Aura Detector
notes: 30ft range.

name: Amulet of Health
notes: Stat override — CON affects everyone meaningfully — attunement required.

name: Cloak of Displacement
notes: Disadvantage on all attacks — very powerful — attunement required. Second copy confirmed intentional.

name: Leather Armor +2
notes: +2 armor — attunement required.

name: Shield of Retribution
effect: When bearer is hit by melee attack, attacker takes 1d6 force damage.
notes: 1d6 barely noticeable — no attunement required.

name: Bracer of Steady Aim
effect: +1 ranged attack. Advantage on concentration saves after taking damage.
notes: +1 bonus with minor concentration benefit — no attunement required.

notes: No attunement required per RAW.

name: Warding Vambrace
notes: Once per day damage reduction — situational — no attunement required.

name: Ring of Feather Falling
notes: Single situational utility — no attunement required.

notes: Backup. Silvered — no attunement required.

effect: Every spell cast treated as one level higher automatically.

effect: Resistance to one element chosen on attunement. Attuned to: fire.
notes: Single elemental resistance — no attunement required.

notes: Meaningful combat boost to primary role — attunement required.

name: Bracers of Defense
notes: +2 AC — attunement required.

notes: Superseded by Robe of the Archmagi. Stored. Concentration protection is meaningful — attunement required.

effect: Stops a harsh impact once per day.
notes: Single situational benefit — no attunement required.

name: The Lexicon

notes: +2 spell DC plus free upcast — multiple significant benefits — attunement required.

notes: Resonance advantage on first attack — powerful — attunement required.

notes: Multiple +2 combat benefits — attunement required.

name: The Farreach (A)
effect: Advantage on first attack each round when within 30ft of paired ring. +1d6 force damage. Once per day: responsive bonus to ability or skill check.

effect: Deals force damage instead of piercing.
notes: +2 primary weapon — attunement required.

name: The Weaver's Master-Awl
description: A simple ancient bone-handled leatherworking awl. The needle-point glows with a faint psionic violet hue.
effect: Four properties: (1) Psionic Reinforcement — Psychic Blades +2 attack and damage. (2) Tactical Foresight — Help targets two allies. (3) Grandmaster's Stitch — infuse leather item during long rest. (4) The Retired Special — once per day reaction pull ally up to 15ft.
notes: Multiple significant benefits — legendary quality — attunement required.

name: Stormsplit
notes: Dual form is one weapon not two benefits — no attunement required.

name: Medium Armor
notes: Chain shirt — superseded by Half Plate +2. Stored.

notes: +1 armor only — no attunement required.

notes: Greataxe. Trophy/display. +1 only — no attunement required.

name: Ring of Spell Storing (5 levels)
effect: Holds up to 5 levels worth of spells. Any creature can cast stored spell.
notes: Significant spell storage — attunement required. Unassigned.

effect: Holds one spell up to 3rd level.
notes: Spell storage — attunement required. Unassigned.

notes: Significant spell storage — attunement required. Unassigned.

notes: Applied to Rapier +2 (Psychic). +1 only — no attunement.

effect: +1 to hit with wrapped weapon.
notes: Applied to Greatsword +3. +1 only — no attunement.

name: Carved Bone Totem
notes: Spellcasting focus. Thirty years old.

name: Hide Armor
notes: Worn and repaired many times.

name: Simple Spear
notes: Hasn't used offensively in fifteen years.

name: Battle Spellbook
effect: Contains: Blight, Fire Shield, Ice Storm, Otiluke's Resilient Sphere, Cone of Cold, Destructive Wave, Immolation, Cloudkill.

name: Scroll of Thunderstorm
effect: Single use. Large area lightning damage.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
effect: Restores 4d4+4 HP.

name: Gemstones
notes: 6 spinel, 2 sapphire.

name: Tome of Clear Thought
effect: Reading takes 48 hours over 6 days. INT score and maximum increase by 2. Becomes mundane for 100 years afterward.
notes: Read on day 121.

notes: Backup melee. No special properties — no attunement required.

name: Mithral Half Plate +2
effect: No stealth disadvantage.
notes: +2 armor — attunement required.

effect: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage.
notes: +2 armor plus resistance — attunement required.

name: Boots of Speed
effect: Double movement speed as bonus action. Opportunity attacks have disadvantage while active.
notes: Multiple significant combat benefits — attunement required. Unassigned.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
effect: Resistance to cold damage. Move across icy surfaces without penalty. Withstand extreme cold.
notes: Single utility benefit — no attunement required.

name: Ring of Spell Turning
effect: Advantage on saves against spells targeting only you. On natural 20, spell reflected back at caster.
notes: Very powerful — multiple significant benefits — attunement required. Unassigned.

name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
effect: +2 CON. Advantage on CHA checks with dwarves. Darkvision 60ft. Resistance to poison, advantage on poison saves.
notes: Multiple significant benefits — attunement required. Unassigned.

name: Goggles of Night
effect: Darkvision 60ft. If already have darkvision, extends by 60ft.
notes: Single utility benefit — no attunement required. Unassigned.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
effect: Sets STR to 19.
notes: Stat override — attunement required. Unassigned. Corwin already has a pair.

name: Gloves of Soul Catching
effect: On unarmed strike hit: deal extra 2d10 psychic damage. Choose to regain HP equal to psychic damage dealt OR gain advantage on one roll.
notes: Multiple significant combat benefits — attunement required.

name: Bracers of Striking +2
effect: +2 to unarmed strike attack and damage rolls.
notes: +2 to primary combat stat — attunement required.

name: Monk's Belt
effect: Adds CON modifier to unarmored AC in addition to DEX and WIS.
notes: Changes AC formula — significant — attunement required.

name: Robe of the Archmagi
effect: +2 spell DC and attack, advantage on saves against spells, AC 15 unarmored.
notes: Legendary quality — multiple significant benefits — attunement required.

name: Scroll of Ice Storm
effect: Cast Ice Storm at 4th level. Single use.

name: Scroll of Mind Whip
effect: Cast Mind Whip at 2nd level. Single use.

name: Helm of Brilliance
effect: 6 opals cast Daylight. 9 rubies cast Fireball. 5 diamonds cast Wall of Light. Undead within 30ft have disadvantage on attacks. On 1 in sunlight: explodes.
notes: Multiple significant benefits — legendary quality — attunement required. Unassigned.

name: The Right Arm
appearance: Ancient wood of unknown origin, warm to touch. Living moss covers most of the surface. Small flowers bloom and die on their own schedule. Insects appear occasionally that have no business being wherever the bearer currently is.

modes.name: Spellcasting Focus
modes.description: Spell save DC +2. Once per long rest: cast any spell without expending a slot.

modes.name: Melee Weapon
modes.description: +3 quarterstaff. Automatically deals most harmful damage type to target. Once per short rest on hit: vines root target until end of their next turn.

modes.name: Wildshape Enhancement
modes.description: Staff merges into non-halfling forms. While merged: +3 attack and damage, HP maximum increases by druid level, once per wildshape cast a cantrip as bonus action. In Stars form the staff remains physical.

notes: Tackett refers to it as his right arm. Offered by the Trevash delta spring after Tackett destroyed the ancient spirit corrupting it.
